article_title: NRC Grants Diablo Canyon a 20-Year License Extension, Marking the Agency's 100th Renewal as California's Nuclear Future Hinges on State Lawmakers

content_preview.title: NRC Grants Diablo Canyon a 20-Year License Extension, Marking the Agency's 100th Renewal as California's Nuclear Future Hinges on State Lawmakers
content_preview.summary: Federal regulators approved a 20-year license extension for California's last nuclear plant, but state law limits operations to 2030 without legislative action.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission on April 2 approved a 20-year license renewal for Pacific Gas and Electric's Diablo Canyon Power Plant, California's last operating nuclear facility. The decision extends the federal operating authorization for Unit 1 through November 2, 2044, and Unit 2 through August 26, 2045, according to [PG&E's announcement](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/us-nuclear-regulatory-commission-approves-license-renewal-application-for-extended-operation...
